extraction.one_line_summary: JUNGELS Bob won from a 21-rider breakaway, dropping VAN AERT on the descent 55km out and holding off PINOT's late chase.
tactical_patterns: JUNGELS attacked on descent from third of four climbs at 55km, not summit, exploiting technical downhill skills.
Peloton allowed 21-rider break after initially suppressing moves, suggesting GC teams conserving energy pre-rest day.
POGACAR's team defended yellow with minimal work despite controlling race, indicating comfort with current GC gaps.
THOMAS lost 3 seconds in final sprint despite being with GC group, revealing tactical sloppiness or fatigue.

rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: First win in years after struggling form, attacked on descent not climb, dropped in-form VAN AERT
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Couldn't follow JUNGELS' descent attack despite winning previous day and sprinting well 24h earlier
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: Lost 21 seconds despite desperate late chase, couldn't bring back solo JUNGELS in final kilometers
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: negative: Crashed early on flat roundabout approach despite targeting stage, neutralized before climbing started
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Lost 3 seconds to POGACAR/VINGEGAARD in final sprint positioning, careless time management
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: Moved onto second GC page within 2 minutes, climbing form building toward second week
